name: Cranberry Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together eggs, corn syrup, sugar, melted butter and vanilla until well blended.
2. Stir in pecans, cranberries and orange rind.
3. Pour the mixture into the pastry shell.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 55 to 60 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
5. Cool on a wire rack.
6. If desired, serve with whipped cream. Makes 8 servings.
